title: Tuple Destructure
description: Create a tuple containing different types and destructure it into separate variables.
problemStatement:
Group your data! Create a tuple named `tup` that contains an integer `500`, a float `6.4`, and a boolean `true`. Then, destructure it into three variables and print only the float value.

**Requirement:** Use the `let (x, y, z) = tup;` syntax.
hints: Tuples allow you to group multiple values with different types into one compound type.
